title: Ananda in the Himalayas is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)

jsonLd.title: Ananda in the Himalayas is Hiring: Guest Relations Manager (Lead)
jsonLd.description:
We at Ananda in the Himalayas are looking for an experienced Guest Relations Manager based out of Nagpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Ananda in the Himalayas:
Ananda in the Himalayas is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Barista Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ananda in the Himalayas!
